CustomField.description: Date the SaaS training webinar was completed. Formula field to pull this value from related account record.
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Account__r.Webinar_1_Completed_Date__c)), ISBLANK(SaaS_Primary_Contact__r.Webinar_1_Completed_Date__c) ), Account__r.Webinar_1_Completed_Date__c, IF( AND( ISBLANK(Account__r.Webinar_1_Completed_Date__c), NOT(ISBLANK(SaaS_Primary_Contact__r.Webinar_1_Completed_Date__c)) ), SaaS_Primary_Contact__r.Webinar_1_Completed_Date__c, IF( Account__r.Webinar_1_Completed_Date__c > SaaS_Primary_Contact__r.Webinar_1_Completed_Date__c, Account__r.Webinar_1_Completed_Date__c, SaaS_Primary_Contact__r.Webinar_1_Completed_Date__c ) ) )
CustomField.label: Webinar 1 Completed Date
